\tzpentry{ID5128}{Delta Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5128 introduces Delta Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \delta(\mathbf{x})=\delta(r,\hat n) =\sum_{\ell=0}^{\infty}\sum_{m=-\ell}^{\ell}\int_0^\infty \! dk \; \delta_{\ell m}(k)\, j_\ell(kr)\, Y_\ell^m(\hat n). \tag{1} \]
